I translated complex technical findings into business recommendations during stakeholder meetings, closing the gap between raw data and growth strategy, which directly addresses the need for clear, executive-ready narratives. i’m excited by the opportunity to use my quantitative and analytical skills in working on rebate analytics and uncovering rebate performance gaps at 259Rx. i know that my proficiency in SQL, Python, advanced Excel, and my commitment to analytical accuracy align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Analyst – Pharmacy Pricing role. i would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. thank you for your time and consideration. i look forward to hearing from you soon. warm regards Justin Miller
